expectations.text: States newer lifters generally need more hypertrophy work, not less
expectations.evidence: States beginners should dedicate '50-70% of training volume to hypertrophy-focused work.'

expectations.text: Recommends learning the lifts first, then building muscle while maintaining heavier work
expectations.evidence: Discusses building foundation of muscle mass with compounds at moderate loads.

expectations.text: Describes shift toward more specific strength work as lifters advance
expectations.evidence: Advanced lifters 'reduce hypertrophy emphasis to 30-50%' with more specific work.

expectations.text: Notes high-rep bodybuilding work is a poor fit close to competition (within ~4 weeks)
expectations.evidence: In-season: hypertrophy drops to 20-40%, focus shifts to maximal strength work.
Does not discuss adherence or enjoyment.
